programmes.show_name: The Swansea Boys Who Built Bombs
programmes.show_description: The little known story of the Welsh scientists who developed atomic weapons and how their research eventually turned to peace.

programmes.show_name: Welsh Dragons of the Battle of Britain
programmes.show_description: How the Welsh fought off invasion in Britain's darkest hour. Contains some strong language and some upsetting scenes.
